name: Ratcheting Leg Spring
description:
This model gains the following ability:

Plink!: When this model is dealt damage, it may discard this upgrade to reduce the damage by 1.

This model gains the following action:

granted_abilities.name: Plink!
granted_abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may discard this upgrade to reduce the damage by 1.

granted_actions.name: Spring and Sprong
granted_actions.effects: Place this model within range. Deal 1 damage to this model and any models in base contact with this model. Then, discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: The description section includes both the ability and action introduction as they are part of the upgrade's descriptive text.
Spring and Sprong is a tactical action with TN 6, indicated by the TN column value.
